title: Team Sports and Simple Rules
article_text: A team sport is a game for a group of people. It is easy to learn the general rules for a short game. Each individual on a team must agree to wait for their turn. A good player can sense when to pass the ball to another person. Perhaps you can add a new rule to the game. The team with the black shirts can produce a full effort. They appear strong and ready to play. I require a short break after a long period of play. Social history notes that people sell sports items across the world. A body can learn a lot from a simple game.

sentences.en: A team sport is a game for a group of people.
sentences.zh: 团队运动是一种适合一群人的游戏。

words.eng_def: a group of people who work or play together
a game or activity that people do for fun or exercise
a number of people or things together

sentences.en: It is easy to learn the general rules for a short game.
sentences.zh: 学习一个简短游戏的一般规则很容易。

words.eng_def: a statement that tells what you can or cannot do
not long in time or size

sentences.en: Each individual on a team must agree to wait for their turn.
sentences.zh: 团队中的每个人都必须同意等待轮到自己。

words.eng_def: to have the same idea as someone else
to stay in a place until something happens

sentences.en: A good player can sense when to pass the ball to another person.
sentences.zh: 一个好的球员能感觉到什么时候把球传给另一个人。

words.eng_def: to feel or know something without being told
to give something to someone else
a round thing used in games

sentences.en: Perhaps you can add a new rule to the game.
sentences.zh: 也许你可以给游戏添加一条新规则。

words.eng_def: to put something with another thing

sentences.en: The team with the black shirts can produce a full effort.
sentences.zh: 穿黑色衬衫的团队可以付出全部努力。

words.eng_def: the use of energy to do something

sentences.en: They appear strong and ready to play.
sentences.zh: 他们看起来强壮且准备好比赛。

sentences.en: I require a short break after a long period of play.
sentences.zh: 在长时间比赛后，我需要一个短暂的休息。

words.eng_def: a short time when you stop doing something

sentences.en: Social history notes that people sell sports items across the world.
sentences.zh: 社会历史指出人们在世界各地出售体育用品。

words.eng_def: related to people living together in groups
to say or write something important
from one side to the other; in many places

sentences.en: A body can learn a lot from a simple game.
sentences.zh: 身体可以从一个简单的游戏中学到很多。

words.eng_def: the whole physical structure of a person or animal
to get knowledge or skill by study or experience

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“感觉或意识到某事”？
